research.partner_description: Argentine influencer and content creator with a love for travel and family vibes, 15K+ followers
fun_facts: Obsessed with his fluffy dog Milo, who steals the show in almost every IG story
Rocking that effortlessly cool defender style with oversized fits and fresh kicks off the field
Big foodie who shares mouthwatering asado posts from family BBQs
Avid traveler, always posting scenic couple getaways and beach sunsets
